title: libpod: Add support for 'podman info' on FreeBSD
body:
This moves linux-specific code into info_linux.go, leaving generic code in info.go.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: The change to define.HostInfo is probably a bad idea - it breaks the build for darwin and windows and these fields need to be present for podman-remote where the remote host is linux (which is probably always right now). I will remove that part.
